scope: Visible Book-selected fake-token open/cancel/fill status breadth

assertions.bookSelection: Book selector changes from Moneyline to Spreads with selected-market-mexico-ecuador-spread selected-line-1.5 selected-period-regulation selected-outcome-yes selected-side-yes
assertions.ticketReady: trade-ticket keeps ticket-market-id-mexico-ecuador-spread ticket-outcome-id-yes ticket-line-1.5 ticket-period-regulation and enables place-mock-order at $25
assertions.openStatus: latest-order-card and open-order-row expose fake-token-test order-status-open for the same Book-selected Spread identity
assertions.cancelStatus: cancel-open-order removes the open branch and latest-activity-card/activity-row expose fake-token-test activity-canceled status-canceled
assertions.filledStatus: position-card plus filled activity-row expose fake-token-test activity-opened status-filled for the same Book-selected identity
assertions.fallbackGuard: No Team to Advance or Mexico moneyline fallback appears after the Book-selected order

remainingGaps: This proof uses the deterministic backend-shaped local Book/order service in mock mode, not a real wallet signature.
Broader real provider-backed line-family lifecycle breadth remains P1 until backend/provider line families are ready.
